summary:
None of the retrieved documents provide information about the HVTN 702 trial or ALVAC-HIV’s effectiveness; therefore, their claimed ineffectiveness lacks supporting evidence within these results. Based on external knowledge aligned with established medical literature—where ALVAC-HIV has historically shown minimal protective effects—it can reasonably be concluded that ALVAC-HIV did not prevent HIV infection effectively.\boxed{B}
